creator: bhughes@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 176613
devel/awscli: Update to 1.11.13

Bump to the latest upstream release. Bump version on devel/py-botocore
to 1.4.70 and net/py-s3transfer to 0.1.9, keeping in sync with upstream.
    
Take maintainership offered by Alexey via email. Thanks :)
    
https://github.com/aws/aws-cli/blob/1.11.13/CHANGELOG.rst

portlint: OK (-C, looks fine.)
testport: OK (poudriere: 11.0-R, 10.[123]-R, 9.3-R, amd64/i386, default options)
